General.Name: Charwood Energy SA
General.GicIndustry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
General.Description: Charwood Energy SA offers decarbonized energy solutions from biomass recovery. The company operates as an independent power producer, as well as operates power plants for third parties. It serves industrials, communities, and agriculturalists. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Saint-Nolff, France.
